facebook.caption: Upmarket seafood plates and a sea-view terrace for $15-30 a person. At Xin Chao, that's the actual bill. 4,975 reviews back it up. Fresh catches, a buzzing crowd, and the kind of terrace where you lose track of time. On Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, right on the water. Book ahead or wait. Worth both. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Plates landing on the table, ocean right behind them. This is Xin Chao on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Upmarket seafood, $15-30 a head, terrace packed for a reason. 4,975 reviews. Go find out why.

instagram.caption: $15-30 for upmarket seafood overlooking the sea. Xin Chao is not messing around. 4,975 reviews agree. Save this.
